results.title: New Relic
results.description: New Relic is an observability platform that provides deep visibility into systems, applications, and infrastructure. It helps users monitor, troubleshoot, and improve digital performance across various technologies.

results.title: Pulumi New Relic
results.description: The New Relic provider for Pulumi allows users to manage New Relic resources, such as applications, dashboards, and alerts, using infrastructure as code.

results.title: Pulumi New Relic Provider
results.description: The Pulumi New Relic Provider enables users to manage New Relic resources and configurations as infrastructure as code. It integrates with New Relic's monitoring and observability platform to automate the deployment and management of alerts, dashboards, applications, and more.

results.title: New Relic Go Agent
results.description: The New Relic Go Agent monitors Go applications by tracking transactions, outbound requests, database calls, and providing runtime insights into goroutine activity, garbage collection, and memory usage.

results.title: Relic
results.description: Relic is a Clojure(Script) data structure providing a functional relational programming model with features like an in-memory database, declarative queries, constraints, and reactive capabilities.

results.title: New Relic Node.js Agent
results.description: This package instruments your Node.js application for performance monitoring with New Relic, providing insights into transactions, traces, and application health.

results.title: New Relic Monitoring for .NET
results.description: New Relic's .NET agent monitors your .NET applications, providing an end-to-end view of their performance across all .NET compatible languages like C# and VB.NET.

results.title: New Relic Ruby Agent
results.description: The New Relic Ruby agent monitors Ruby applications to identify and solve performance issues, and collect business data to improve customer experience and make data-driven business decisions.

results.title: New Relic Flutter Agent
results.description: The New Relic Flutter Agent instruments Flutter applications with native New Relic Android and iOS agents to collect crashes, network traffic, and other information for hybrid apps.

results.title: New Relic Terraform Provider
results.description: Automate the configuration of New Relic resources using the New Relic Terraform provider, enabling infrastructure as code for your observability platform.

results.title: OpenRelik
results.description: OpenRelik is an open-source platform designed to streamline collaborative digital forensic investigations, featuring modular workflows, intuitive management, real-time collaboration, and a centralized artifact repository, easily extendable with new workers.

results.title: Reliq
results.description: HTML parsing and searching tool

results.title: RuneLite
results.description: Open source Old School RuneScape client

results.title: Mock Redis
results.description: Mock Redis gem for Ruby

results.title: Neo-neo-blessed
results.description: Neo-neo-blessed is a modernized fork of the original blessed library, providing a curses-like, high-level terminal interface API for Node.js with ES6 class support, bug fixes, and maintenance while maintaining full backward compatibility.

results.title: Rails Performance
results.description: Rails Performance is a self-hosted, simple, and free alternative to APM services like New Relic or Datadog, designed to monitor the performance of Ruby on Rails applications.

results.title: RAGLite
results.description: RAGLite is a fast, permissive, and extensible Python toolkit for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using DuckDB or PostgreSQL, supporting various LLMs, rerankers, and advanced chunking techniques.

results.title: Ensnare.test
results.description:

results.title: Newlife Redis
results.description: Newlife Redis is a .NET library that provides a Redis client for .NET applications, enabling efficient data caching and management.

results.title: RuneScape Classic Client
results.description: A project to rename the last RuneScape Classic Client rev.235

results.title: SigNoz
results.description: SigNoz is an open-source observability platform that unifies logs, metrics, and traces, offering a cost-effective alternative to Datadog and New Relic for application monitoring and troubleshooting.

results.title: Satchel
results.description: Satchel is a modern, customizable, and user-friendly open-source alternative to Roblox's default backpack, offering a familiar feel with enhanced features and improved mobile experience.

results.title: Rustic
results.description: rustic - fast, encrypted, and deduplicated backups powered by Rust

results.title: Reliq Python
results.description: A python module for reliq library

results.title: RDR3 Discoveries
results.description: A collection of interesting findings and information from Red Dead Redemption 2 (RDR2), specifically covering Moonshine, Naturalist, and Bounty Hunters DLCs.

results.title: Re.Pack
results.description: Re.Pack is a modern bundler for React Native applications, powered by Rspack and Webpack, serving as a drop-in replacement for Metro with enhanced functionality and access to the Webpack ecosystem.

results.title: Valkyrie
results.description: A Redis and Valkey client for Gleam!

results.title: pylic
results.description: pylic is a PEP-639 compliant Python license checker that verifies all installed packages have explicitly allowed licenses and supports SPDX License Expression syntax.

results.title: Meteor
results.description: A modern Old School Runescape client built with Kotlin, featuring a global design, Jetpack Compose UI, and inspired by RuneLite.

results.title: Open RuneLite
results.description: RuneLite is a free, open-source client for OldSchool RuneScape, offering enhanced features and plugins for players.
